diagrams.title: Coset Partition of Z₁₂ by Subgroup {0,4,8}
diagrams.description: Shows how Z₁₂ breaks into 4 cosets: {0,4,8}, {1,5,9}, {2,6,10}, {3,7,11}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize partition concept and coset structure in cyclic groups

diagrams.title: Normal vs Non-Normal Subgroup
diagrams.description: Compare coset structure: left cosets = right cosets (normal) vs left ≠ right (non-normal)
diagrams.purpose: Understand normality through coset equality and its geometric interpretation

diagrams.title: Quotient Group Formation Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step: Group G → Find normal N → Form cosets → Define operation → Get G/N
diagrams.purpose: Understand quotient group construction and First Isomorphism Theorem visually

diagrams.title: Lagrange's Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Group as pizza divided into equal slices (cosets), each slice size = |H|, number of slices = index
diagrams.purpose: Remember and apply Lagrange's theorem for coset counting
